title: colocasia antiquorum
intro: Colocasia antiquorum, also known as the elephant ear, is a type of tropical plant belonging to the Arum family, characterized by its large, dark green leaves resembling an elephant's ear. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Colocasia antiquorum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. Colocasia antiquorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or extract, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
